_comment: Outright-winner odds for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as posted by FanDuel Sportsbook and reported by Fox Sports (https://www.foxsports.com/stories/soccer/world-cup-2026-champion-odds), captured 2026-06-07 (article dated 2026-06-02, updated 2026-06-04). American/moneyline odds as quoted — verify.mjs converts each to an implied probability (100/(odds+100) for the positive odds seen here; -odds/(-odds+100) for negative/odds-on prices) and removes the bookmaker overround by normalising so they sum to 1, before comparing against the model. Like the Elo feed in teams.json, this is a snapshot, not a live feed: odds drift constantly with squad news, market sentiment and proximity to kickoff, so re-capture before relying on a comparison for a date far from the one recorded here. Only the ~21 teams FanDuel actually quotes outright odds for are listed; the other 27 are priced by the market as too unlikely to bother quoting individually.
